form.formComment: Drawn the inside. Latest effort finished last in a Class 2 on April 14 over 457m at Manawatu behind Crossfit Queen beaten 6 lengths (26.59). On best form is more than capable. Among the chances.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Checked and unbalanced entering first bend.
Checked entering first bend and lost ground.

form.formComment: Having her first run at this track. Comes off an average run last start over 527m at Manukau when seventh behind Opawa Selena (32.07) in Class 1/2. Not keen.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Having her first run at this track. Comes off an average run last start over 527m at Manukau when seventh behind Opawa Selena (32.07) in Class 1/2. Not keen.

form.formComment: Last start finished 2nd over 525m at Addington beaten 0.7 lengths (30.32) behind Devil Delia in a Class 2/3 on April 9. Although unsuccessful last time still ran one of the quickest times on the card. Consistent performer who is hard to go past.

formComments.title: TAB

form.formComment: Finished third last start (26.42) at big odds over 457m at Manawatu. Tricky draw to overcome. Capable of playing a big role.

form.formComment: Latest effort finished 3rd over 457m at Manawatu beaten 5.5 lengths (26.06) behind Child Prodigy in a Class 2 on March 27. Strong form emerging from the that last run. Looks all set to find the winners' list.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Dragged down on bend and lost ground.

form.formComment: Won two starts back at Wanganui Straight over 313m in 17.43. Couldn't repeat the feat last time out when fourth over 457m at Manawatu at Class 2 level. Can improve sharply on best.

form.formComment: Missed the frame latest (17.40) when fourth over 295m at Addington in a Class 2. Still a maiden from the draw but has placed five times. With a clean break looks hard to beat.

form.formComment: Lines up from box 8 for the first time after finishing a 7 length fifth at Manukau (31.99) in a Class 3/4. Hard to entertain this time.
